text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Summer training camp has arrived at last.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In addition to training, there are also plenty of events
happening—everything from a beach day to a fireworks show... The
school even planned a barbecue.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I'm off, so time me, okay?
...Hey, you listening?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...Tch. Sit in the shade while you time me. And drink some water. I
don't want to have to redo my laps 'cause you passed out.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I'd like to think Air Shakur and I have grown closer since the beginning. But whether or not she trusts me...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Well, summer is always jam-packed with events, so this is the perfect
time to deepen our bond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Or at least, that's what I had hoped...

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
A day at the beach? Unless it's for training, no way am I spending
time in this heat.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: A fireworks show? What a lame, loud, and illogical idea. Pass.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Not happening.
choice_data_list: But... I haven't said anything yet!

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You're inviting me to the school barbecue. It's so obvious. What's
next, the pool? Camping? Get your summer-loving head out of the
clouds, moooron.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I know you're up to something, so give it up. I'm not doing anything
outside of training.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
All that cheerful laughter is just noise to me, plain and simple. You
should know that by now.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's true that Air Shakur doesn't like noisy places. Perhaps I should
have considered that when finding events to invite her to.
choice_data_list: Well, that doesn't mean I should give up!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Surely there must be a summer activity Air Shakur would like... As I
stare ahead in thought, a spark of light flutters in the distance, before
disappearing again.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching the fireflies would make the perfect peaceful summer
activity! One that I'm sure Air Shakur will enjoy!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With that, I head in the direction I saw the firefly, and my nights
spent searching for their gathering space begin.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Unfortunately, it's been days since then, and my search has yet to
prove fruitful...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I start to wonder if I was seeing things that day. This river looks
perfect for fireflies, but I've yet to see a single one.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Just as I begin to think it better to give up for this year, I feel a hand
on my shoulder.

Stop right there, stranger. Let's see some ID... That reminds me, I've
gotten reports of a weirdo stalking the woods late at night.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Goootcha.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: You've been acting weird all day. You think I wouldn't notice?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Now, what're you up to?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Looks like I'd better fess up... I explain my quest for fireflies and the
reason behind it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Now it's fireflies, huh? I thought you'd been too quiet lately... When
are you gonna learn?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
I thought I told you. I don't need all this buddy-buddy stuff. I
already—
choice_data_list: I know, I know. You already have Parcae.
I know, I know. You already have Parcae.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't get it.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: I don't get it. If you know, then why can't you just accept it?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
At first, I thought it was pity or a sense of superiority, but I don't think
that's it. It's something else.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
So why do all this? Conviction? A sense of duty? Some weird new
training technique I'm unaware of?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The answer comes to me surprisingly quick.
choice_data_list: I just care about you. That's all.
I just care about you. That's all.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I explain that I know Air Shakur already has the perfect partner in her
PC. No doubt that's the reason she was able to get this far without
trouble.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: But if she continues to avoid relying on others, I can't help but worry about what will happen when she does encounter trouble she can't handle.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If she pushes people away even then, whatever that trouble is, it
could stop her in her tracks.
choice_data_list: That's why I want us to get closer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
Ha... So this improbable possibility you've come up with is the reason
you've been inviting me to every little thing?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You got us kicked out of a net cafe, inserted yourself into my
shopping... and wandered around in the dark hunting bugs for that?

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: What were you going to do if this pissed me off more? It would've ended in a lot more than me pushing you away.
choice_data_list: I know you wouldn't let it get that far.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Air Shakur is anything but timid. If I really made her mad, she would have simply found another trainer.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: Sigh... So annoying.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You talk like you know what you're doing, yet here you are, worrying
about something that isn't even guaranteed to happen.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text: It's so illogical. Just like everything you do.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
...And fireflies prefer darker places than this. The ground is too hard,
and there's not enough grass. Did you even check upstream?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Air Shakur turns and heads in the opposite direction of camp. For a
second I think to correct her, but something stops me.

text_block_list.name: Air Shakur
text_block_list.text:
You coming or not?
Watching fireflies doesn't sound so bad.
